/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/INTC/X: BEWNJAMIN MERCER-GOLDEN APPEARS WITH OLIVIA TALOR FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY AND MTS/INTC/X:THE PEOPLE TOOK A FIRST DISMISSAL, DEFENDANT WAS RE-ARRANGED ON SAME COMPLAINT WITH STIPULATION OF BOTH PARTIES,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVESTHE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-01-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY AND MOTION TOSUPPRESS/TE:90 MINS/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:COURT GRANTED THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE/CAUSE/LD:12-20-21 (60TH)/CONT/DOP/X:SDT ARE RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL IN DISCOVERY,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 11-02-21 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 12-20-21,/X: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON ACM/WS//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AT 70 OAK GROVE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 TO BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: INTERSECTION OF TURK ST & HYDE ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1,5 HOURS/
